questions.question: What is the primary function of a database management system (DBMS)?
questions.hint: A DBMS provides a way to store, organize, and manage data efficiently

questions.question: What is the difference between a relational database and a NoSQL database?
questions.hint: A relational database uses tables and structured queries, whereas a NoSQL database uses flexible schema and unstructured queries

questions.question: What is the purpose of normalization in database design?
questions.hint: Normalization reduces data redundancy, minimizes data anomalies, and improves data integrity
